havens.description: Once a derelict building slated for demolition, The Reflection Wells has been transformed into an art commune and performance space. The upper floors house private apartments for select Toreador, while the lower level hosts salons and midnight recitals. Mirrors and light installations line the halls, both aesthetic and symbolic.
havens.quest_description: Earn the trust of Cordelia Fairchild by curating or saving a notable artistic piece.
features: Occasional mortal visitors risk Masquerade breaches
Access to Gallery Network (Toreador-only gossip line)

havens.location: Beneath Sky Harbor Airport access tunnels
havens.description: A labyrinth of maintenance shafts, sealed drainage tunnels, and forgotten sub-basements — home to Phoenix’s Nosferatu warren. Graffiti tags mark safe paths, and crude monitors show hacked airport security feeds.
havens.quest_description: Retrieve a stolen data drive from an Anarch courier.
features: Nosferatu or allies only (Camarilla members risk hostility)

havens.location: Desert fringe between Apache Junction and the Superstition Mountains
havens.description: A scattered set of trailers and sheds hidden among cactus and stones. A fire pit, hunting trophies, and solar panels mark this quiet outpost. Few come here uninvited — and fewer leave without permission.
havens.quest_description: Track and eliminate a rogue lupine encroaching on the Valley border.
features: Periodic encounters with desert spirits or Garou

havens.description: A lush, hypnotic den of vice. The Velvet Door’s crimson and gold décor hides layers of temptation and control. The Setites operate it as both a business and sanctuary where mortal and Kindred desires intertwine.
havens.quest_description: Broker peace between a Setite priestess and a Camarilla Harpy.
features: Hidden ritual chamber below the stage

havens.location: Perimeter of the Arizona State Hospital near 24th Street
havens.type: Abandoned medical wing repurposed as a private sanctum
havens.description: Hidden behind bricked windows and condemned signs, the Asylum Grounds serve as sanctuary for the Malkavians under their elder’s watchful madness. Whispers echo through the halls, and the old operating lights still flicker faintly at night.
havens.quest_description: Uncover the truth about an old patient record tied to the Prince’s death.
features: Random prophetic visions (can grant clues or mislead)
Camarilla-aligned but avoided by most Kindred
